social.name: Javier Milei
social.text: RT by @JMilei: El síndrome de estocolmo de los argentinos con los medios no llegara tal vez nunca a su fin. Pero que hermoso es ver el despertar de muchísimos q ya no temen dejar de ser arreados por esta secta de megalomanos desvergonzados.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Ce que nos militaires sont capables d’accomplir est extraordinaire. Nous pouvons être très fiers de nos armées et de leur force d’âme. La France est puissante !

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
Yesterday’s terror attack wasn’t an isolated incident, it was the latest attack on the Jewish community for being Jewish.

Today I spoke with volunteers, first responders from Shomrim and Hatzola to thank them for their bravery.

I know that this is a deeply worrying time for the

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
I am deeply concerned about the terrorist attack that took place today.

This is not an isolated incident. It is the latest in a spate of utterly vile attacks on the Jewish community.

I’ve just chaired an emergency COBR meeting and tomorrow I’ll be bringing together criminal jus

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text:
RT by @realDonaldTrump: On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all.

THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
